h5573ce6fg324cg434fg9e37gd8248a1ac5a4: What're you jawing at me for, recruit? You've got work to do.
habf44ffbg1ce5g493bga1e9gd052fe6edb7c: Welcome to the family. Don't get comfortable - that shipment's wanted in Baldur's Gate.
hdbef90c5g52e4g4c3ag90beg6bb9e18835fe: You're a friend of the Zhent now - that's worth something in Baldur's Gate.
hce4aec62g6ef5g457fg94bcg1cbe27ea49ac: Assuming we make it back there in one piece.
h6f71986bgaf59g45f5g8ef7gc54d42eaa528: Gods damn it. What about the shipment?
h15693a81gfca2g4657gb034gf3ed54f1f380: Beshaba's black bones, you did it!
h4a6c132cg182dg4ff1gb2c3g73a43f4330a5: And still sealed? You're a godsdamned wonder. Here's your coin.
hce2abac3g2be3g4f7fgb7e0g43db7f0cda6a: Actual professionals are rare - you ever want more work, come see me in the Gate.
hb95ef6e2gac98g4b62gb939ge363fc54b245: Beshaba's black bones, you bloody found it. Funny thing, though - I swear I told you not to open it.
hfc0e8508g929fg42f8gb203gfe377a3aba44: Couldn't you just be a professional? Do as you're told, no questions asked? Like so:
h27008466g5a18g4363ga655gaafb493d6604: Give her the flask you found inside the chest.
hfecf8098gc355g4510ga40dg45aca65ebed1: You've killed me. You've bloody killed us all. Damned if I won't return the favour.
h0d7349d5g556fg46f7g8c46g45e9145c008d: I had your cargo, but I lost it.
hd91e9ee6ge38eg4bd1g92c4g50c7f2303efb: You... lost it. Funny, that - you just lost a heap of coin too.
h2640d174gc1d5g4298ga8d9g6a97aee2b730: Actually, hells with this - the day I've had? You just lost your life too.
h327627c3g2ecbg4558gbea2g923446e7648d: Good. Reckon you won't find it here, though.
h99801836ge1ecg42ceg87bbg143d7e834aeb: I'm afraid they won't coming back.
hab373ec7g1954g44efg9c74g549c7ad84c38: I saved them. They'll be along soon.
h99c50137g5bc7g413fgae78gccb6dc766e5f: Then I'm much obliged - or I will be, once I see them and their cargo.
h865ff4fcgec78g4cb5gafa7gf5db15168740: Didn't think you'd get your coin based on spinning some tale, did you?
ha3bf4c6fg5a8bg43ccg89e1gf4571e52872d: I saved Rugan. He'll be along soon.
hde313c6eg8c00g4326g84eagdc6118e65cdd: Then I'm in your debt - or will be, once I see him and his cargo.
h253d342bg6fadg4536g82d8g3bb3e0dfcb4c: Well I'll give you a hint, shall I? They ain't down here. On your way.
hf3a852deg249eg47d2gb52dg413692b0d549: Not many can talk their way into a Zhentarim outpost.
h5c5d0d5dg3351g425bga820g3aff1c954d67: I could use someone with your skills. Interested in a job?
h20964323g7d13g4885g9421gf61e21deb79f: I'd rather know who I'd be working for first - the Zhentarim?
h3b6159beg050fg4161gafd8g1ac247c307a7: We're the finest mercenaries on the Coast.
h300af795g0de6g4a5eg935eg1bfcabd27bf1: We can provide you with anything - for a price.
hb041f753g0720g4222g96ddga1a5885070e7: Wait, so what are you: merchants or mercenaries?
h8d7bcbd0g7ca0g424dga68fg54efda0507cd: If you've got coin to spend and problems to solve, the Zhent will relieve you of both.
he9facc23g3f13g4d68gba9ag7a4f367e3f64: But today I'm offering work, not looking for it.
h440bea04ge93ag4c3eg8fa6g60d736f04466: Doesn't sound like a group I want to get involved with.
h066e332dg23edg4692g824cg4c73a0230807: It's gold I'm offering, not a marriage bond.
h6b5a8e39g77bcg40f8gb5ddg6c018436f549: Lot of explosives. Planning a war?
hfe26b0c4ga7c1g46ebg8d76ge7eed2ccca4c: Cleaning up. We had a steady operation going here.
h698934f2g789ag46a1ga6cbga93dea11ee51: Then someone kidnapped a duke - right on our bloody doorstep.
h066c4d3agc83fg4c9bgb07eg231c7afb9ea6: The Flaming Fist will want someone to blame, and I don't plan to leave anything pointing our way.
hf7aca8eage045g4b89ga61egc48af705a3d2: The Fist already know you're here. They just don't care.
h92a0e21fgc646g4c9cg94e6g5502eec1523b: Maybe not now, no. But that'll change once the council gets involved. They'll want heads to roll.
h312775f2g52d3g4f58g9510ga8cc4b53e8d5: We're getting out - just one last loose end to take care of. Help me and I'll make it worth your while.
h5de5417dgb0c6g434dgbb36g556003ebc412: I don't want to get caught up in any of this.
h05d49317ge256g4609g8298gcb0110444502: This job you mentioned - what's involved?
h8d82975fg8c70g4a92g85bag6f85971b88a5: Good luck with that. I don't want to get involved.
hbe2aa4a6gfca8g45b6g8608ga061f09ae329: A job? You were ready to kill me a moment ago.
hb2c39c4dgb143g402ag8ad1g82713860c10e: Still am, as it goes. Take it as a mark of respect.
hfe09cc49ga127g4b2ag9546gaef942f7c122: But right now, I reckon we're better off friends than enemies. You interested or not?
h6be9bd6cgf356g4dbbga6bfgbe054234d085: Some of our people are missing - more importantly, so is their cargo.
h86eeba70g3d01g4c22gab76g0f7c081cae99: Find them. Keep them alive if you can. Failing that, just bring that shipment back. Unopened.
h308ad6b7ged03g4b92gb723g1bc004496a17: I already found them. They're dead.
ha91d2f09g1aa8g473egad9dgb9753473baf2: I found a pair that sound like your men - being swarmed by gnolls.
hff034c70g62c5g417eg8f9dg062efbbbc981: What's so important about this cargo?
h233602c5ga3a1g445dgb6f4g40dc4b926c28: I'm offering hard coin, not idle answers.
h1f3c88d6g1a1eg4e78g9a36g5dd2fd037433: All you need to know is that I'm willing to pay a hideous sum to get it back - unopened.
h36dddfffg5b69g4e8fg9d8fg184f72598a63: Good. Backtrack along the road to the east and look for a wagon. Bodies. The usual.
h2a868911gb4b7g4913g8151g114303a21bcf: Time was, no one dared touch a caravan bearing our colours.
h0316042eg9d9dg4a53g9b59gd06006439da0: Find whoever did this and remind them why.
h483a0731g4b93g4bc0g83afgf310fb3aed79: Sounds shady. I'd rather not get involved.
h7f2d7a9ag02c4g4d4dgb2ebgee063e982ed2: I'm just here to trade - I have my own concerns.
h1b6e1e20gd17bg4631ga100gd47c4491c590: And making a small fortune ain't one of them?
haa1b397dg05d6g4d46g9b66g062fe743bd9a: Spend your coin and be on your way. But be quick about it - we're blowing this place soon.
h60757503g4d7fg4f04gbf00g0a12f7e70cb4: Yeah? Got business to conduct, so if you ain't helping you can toddle off.
h651ac370ga047g43d0gb56bg9722343b232f: I've changed my mind. I'll take the job.
h61e77d46gc0ccg4b9cg9befg7ae3cc328cfc: Looks like we can be friends after all.
he382d839g8c5bg450dgae61gd76259a35f0a: Backtrack along the road to the east. They were travelling with a wagon.
h27b5b4d5g5a92g4d21gbfddg4ce6c8f830f2: Some of our people are missing - more importantly, so is their cargo. They were in a caravan coming from the east.
hf1bb5cbdg314cg4c70g8fbfgdb695608e17b: Bring them back alive if you can. Failing that, get me that shipment. Unopened.
h47136c9eg4d6dg4529gaad5g910b33a7e2cd: I have news of your missing people.
h2a47e490g5d94g4fdcgb84ag054ff8cf7f41: I have news of your missing people.
hfd8e578bg6d56g4b22g820fgfcfc9cb602d6: You've already brought me bad news - tell me you've got something better this time.
hca271e1bg0039g428bg8f1eg482e13a9628d: I was glad to see Rugan, until he told me he lost the shipment.
hf66fe604gbbebg4a14g99c8g53fa508c0d1d: Failure creates debt. And debt requires payment. But he'll live.
hd5fbecf2g64b0g420dgacdfg4b74cd72b269: I owe you one for saving my people. The Zhentarim look out for their own - even if it's Rugan.
h70ecb73dg35fag4872g9ac0gdd1bb044a428: Pity we didn't have you on the job from the start.
hf39ce72fg9ba2g4917g83a7gccf164070fc1: What makes that cargo so important?
h2fd56ca4geafbg4eecg95c3g80403feee4be: You did me a service - doesn't make you one of us.
ha6459b03g98fcg44bfg9a50gcb2dcdb43ac0: Our trader can show you some of our more exotic items, now - but don't delay. This place is likely to be rubble soon.
h253d723eg6160g4135g86f9g2ad1603c3bde: Rubble? What are you planning to do?
h16e8551bg34a4g44c0g8749g13f39e9c20ca: Someone kidnapped a duke - right on our bloody doorstep. The Flaming Fist will need someone to blame.
ha0054e37g3d24g4ad1ga1aege76348e5b929: I don't plan on it being us.
h56b5ea84g4e75g4e1dg8d08g5ae8a3f8b361: That's worth some coin. And my thanks.
hc6f9f723g8afcg4c6eg8c22g26d4d231dcc2: That's worth some coin. And my thanks.
